description: Add task status tracking and filtering.

userStories.title: Add task status schema default
userStories.description: As a product team, I want tasks to store a status value so that task progress persists reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a `status` column or field to tasks with allowed values `pending`, `in_progress`, and `done`
Existing tasks default to `pending` after migration or backfill
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose task status in shared models
userStories.description: As a developer, I want shared task types to include status so that backend and UI code use one contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared task model or DTO includes the status field and enum values
Task list data returned to the UI includes status for each task
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add backend task status update action
userStories.description: As a user, I want task status changes to save immediately so that the task list reflects current progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide a server action, endpoint, or service that updates a task status to pending, in_progress, or done
Reject invalid status values before persistence
Updated task status is returned or revalidated for the task list
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend task list status filter
userStories.description: As a user, I want the task list query to filter by status so that I can focus on a subset of work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list data source accepts an optional status filter
Filtering returns only tasks matching the selected status
The default task list still returns all tasks when no filter is selected
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show task status badge on cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task card to show its current status so that I can scan progress quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards display a visible badge for pending, in progress, or done
Badge text matches the task status returned by the data model
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task list status control
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change task status from the task list so that I do not have to open a separate detail view.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task row or card exposes a status control with pending, in progress, and done options
Changing the control invokes the backend status update and refreshes the visible task state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task list status filter UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want a task list filter for status so that I can quickly view pending, active, or completed work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list includes filter options for All, Pending, In Progress, and Done
Changing the filter reloads or refines the list using the backend status filter
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
